PSC Category II: Negative — acute neutrophilic inflammation

PSC Category II: Negative — benign lymphoid cells

TIS Category II: NFM — negative for malignancy
TIS Category III: AUS — atypia of undetermined significance
Bethesda VI: Malignant — papillary thyroid carcinoma
Bethesda V: Suspicious for malignancy — suspicious PTC
Bethesda I: Nondiagnostic — scant follicular cells

Bethesda III: AUS — atypia of undetermined significance

Bethesda NILM: negative for intraepithelial lesion or malignancy

Bethesda LSIL: low-grade squamous intraepithelial lesion
Bethesda HSIL/SCC: high-grade SIL or squamous carcinoma
Bethesda AGC/AIS: atypical glandular cells or adenocarcinoma
Bethesda NILM: Trichomonas vaginalis organism present
Bethesda NILM: fungal organisms consistent with Candida
